title: astragalus pusillus
intro: Astragalus pusillus, also known as dwarf milkvetch, is a small, perennial legume native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Astragalus pusillus include immune system support, reduced inflammation, and improved cardiovascular health, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds, flu, and other respiratory issues. Astragalus pusillus can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
